mapper.select:
SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, supplier_short_name, credit_code, legal_representative, contact_address, contact_phone, bank_name, bank_account, account_name, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM supplier_main
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, supplier_short_name, credit_code, legal_representative, contact_address, contact_phone, bank_name, bank_account, account_name, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM supplier_main WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, supplier_short_name, credit_code, legal_representative, contact_address, contact_phone, bank_name, bank_account, account_name, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM supplier_main WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_main ( supplier_code, supplier_name, supplier_short_name, credit_code, legal_representative, contact_address, contact_phone, bank_name, bank_account, account_name, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{supplierShortName}, #{creditCode}, #{legalRepresentative}, #{contactAddress}, #{contactPhone}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{accountName}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE supplier_main
supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, supplier_short_name = #{supplierShortName}, credit_code = #{creditCode}, legal_representative = #{legalRepresentative}, contact_address = #{contactAddress}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account = #{bankAccount}, account_name = #{accountName}, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE supplier_main SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE supplier_main SET deleted = 0, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(supplier_code) FROM supplier_main WHERE supplier_code LIKE 'SUP%'
